title: hoehnea scutellarioides
intro: Hoehnea scutellarioides, also known as 'Mistinha' or 'Mistinha do campo', is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Hoehnea scutellarioides include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Hoehnea scutellarioides is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or infused oil.
